'''shodhalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbery|rubbery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbery|rubbery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shodhalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhalithi|shodhalithi]] || [[word:shodhaliji|shodhaliji]] || [[word:shodhalishi|shodhalishi]] || [[word:shodhaliki|shodhaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhaluthuthu|shodhaluthuthu]] || [[word:shodhalujuju|shodhalujuju]] || [[word:shodhalushushu|shodhalushushu]] || [[word:shodhalukuku|shodhalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhaluthu|shodhaluthu]] || [[word:shodhaluju|shodhaluju]] || [[word:shodhalushu|shodhalushu]] || [[word:shodhaluku|shodhaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhalufthuf|shodhalufthuf]] || [[word:shodhalufjuf|shodhalufjuf]] || [[word:shodhalufshuf|shodhalufshuf]] || [[word:shodhalufkuf|shodhalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhalethe|shodhalethe]] || [[word:shodhaleje|shodhaleje]] || [[word:shodhaleshe|shodhaleshe]] || [[word:shodhaleke|shodhaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhalothotho|shodhalothotho]] || [[word:shodhalojojo|shodhalojojo]] || [[word:shodhaloshosho|shodhaloshosho]] || [[word:shodhalokoko|shodhalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhalotho|shodhalotho]] || [[word:shodhalojo|shodhalojo]] || [[word:shodhalosho|shodhalosho]] || [[word:shodhaloko|shodhaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhalofthof|shodhalofthof]] || [[word:shodhalofjof|shodhalofjof]] || [[word:shodhalofshof|shodhalofshof]] || [[word:shodhalofkof|shodhalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhalĂŠthĂŠ|shodhalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhalĂŠjĂŠ|shodhalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhalĂŠshĂŠ|shodhalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhalĂŠkĂŠ|shodhalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhalathatha|shodhalathatha]] || [[word:shodhalajaja|shodhalajaja]] || [[word:shodhalashasha|shodhalashasha]] || [[word:shodhalakaka|shodhalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhalatha|shodhalatha]] || [[word:shodhalaja|shodhalaja]] || [[word:shodhalasha|shodhalasha]] || [[word:shodhalaka|shodhalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhalafthaf|shodhalafthaf]] || [[word:shodhalafjaf|shodhalafjaf]] || [[word:shodhalafshaf|shodhalafshaf]] || [[word:shodhalafkaf|shodhalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shodhalasha|shodhalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhalshĂ«sha|shodhalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhalrosha|shodhalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhalmusha|shodhalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhalyasha|shodhalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhalnkshĂ«sha|goshodhalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhalnkrosha|goshodhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhalnkmusha|goshodhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhalnkyasha|goshodhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shodhadhalasha|shodhadhalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhadhalshĂ«sha|shodhadhalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhadhalrosha|shodhadhalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhadhalmusha|shodhadhalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhadhalyasha|shodhadhalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhadhalnkshĂ«sha|goshodhadhalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhadhalnkrosha|goshodhadhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhadhalnkmusha|goshodhadhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhadhalnkyasha|goshodhadhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shedhĂŠlasha|shedhĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shedhĂŠlshĂ«sha|shedhĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shedhĂŠlrosha|shedhĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shedhĂŠlmusha|shedhĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shedhĂŠlyasha|shedhĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|goshedhĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠlnkrosha|goshedhĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠlnkmusha|goshedhĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠlnkyasha|goshedhĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shodhfalasha|shodhfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhfalshĂ«sha|shodhfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhfalrosha|shodhfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhfalmusha|shodhfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhfalyasha|shodhfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhfalnkshĂ«sha|goshodhfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhfalnkrosha|goshodhfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhfalnkmusha|goshodhfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhfalnkyasha|goshodhfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
